name: Alucard (animated series)
description: Adrian Ţepeş, more commonly known by the pseudonym Alucard, is one of the main protagonists in the Netflix original series, Castlevania. He is the son of Vlad "Dracula" Ţepeş and the late Lisa Ţepeş. Story set when he was suffering from depression and loneliness in Castlevania.
creator: JeslynLemons
